title: An Act to Create Equity in Maine's Highway Funding by Imposing a Road Use Fee for Electric Vehicles
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 22, 2025
last_house_action: 5/13/2025 - Report of the Chair-Pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 Representative CLOUTIER from the Committee on TAXATION Reports a recommendation for a CHANGE OF COMMITEE . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . On motion of Representative CLOUTIER, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/22/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on May 1, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.

Report of the Chair-Pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 Representative CLOUTIER from the Committee on TAXATION Reports a recommendation for a CHANGE OF COMMITEE . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . On motion of Representative CLOUTIER, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. On motion by Senator Grohoski of Hancock for the Committee on Taxation REFERRED to the Committee on Transportation, in concurrence.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
